export const DOCUMENT_TYPES = [
  { value: "policy", label: "Policy" },
  { value: "procedure", label: "Procedure" },
  { value: "guideline", label: "Guideline" },
  { value: "template", label: "Template" },
  { value: "form", label: "Form" },
  { value: "fact-sheets", label: "Fact Sheets" },
  { value: "position-descriptions", label: "Position Descriptions" },
  { value: "registers", label: "Registers" },
  { value: "legislations", label: "Legislations" },
  { value: "resources", label: "Resources" },
  { value: "others", label: "Others" }
];
export const DOCUMENT_CATEGORIES = [
  { value: "gov", label: "Governance & Leadership", code: "GOV", fullLabel: "Governance & Leadership (GOV)" },
  { value: "con", label: "Consumer Rights & Engagement", code: "CON", fullLabel: "Consumer Rights & Engagement (CON)" },
  { value: "cln", label: "Clinical Governance", code: "CLN", fullLabel: "Clinical Governance (CLN)" },
  { value: "wkf", label: "Workforce & People", code: "WKF", fullLabel: "Workforce & People (WKF)" },
  { value: "ops", label: "Operational Services & Environment", code: "OPS", fullLabel: "Operational Services & Environment (OPS)" },
  { value: "fin", label: "Finance & Business Integrity", code: "FIN", fullLabel: "Finance & Business Integrity (FIN)" },
  { value: "ict", label: "Information & Technology", code: "ICT", fullLabel: "Information & Technology (ICT)" }
];
export const SECTORS = [
  { value: "aged-care", label: "Aged Care" },
  { value: "ndis", label: "NDIS" },
  { value: "home-care", label: "Home Care" },
  { value: "retirement-living", label: "Retirement Living" },
  { value: "universal", label: "Universal" }
];
export const getDocumentTypeLabel = (value) => {
  const type = DOCUMENT_TYPES.find((t) => t.value === value);
  return type?.label || value;
};
export const getCategoryLabel = (value, includeCode = true) => {
  const category = DOCUMENT_CATEGORIES.find((c) => c.value === value);
  if (!category) return value;
  return includeCode ? category.fullLabel : category.label;
};
export const getCategoryCode = (value) => {
  const category = DOCUMENT_CATEGORIES.find((c) => c.value === value);
  return category?.code || "";
};
export const getSectorLabel = (value) => {
  const sector = SECTORS.find((s) => s.value === value);
  return sector?.label || value;
};
export const isValidDocumentType = (value) => {
  return DOCUMENT_TYPES.some((t) => t.value === value);
};
export const isValidCategory = (value) => {
  return DOCUMENT_CATEGORIES.some((c) => c.value === value);
};
export const isValidSector = (value) => {
  return SECTORS.some((s) => s.value === value);
};
export const TAXONOMY_VALIDATION_RULES = {
  type: {
    required: true,
    message: "Document type is required",
    enum: DOCUMENT_TYPES.map((t) => t.value)
  },
  category: {
    required: true,
    message: "Category is required",
    enum: DOCUMENT_CATEGORIES.map((c) => c.value)
  },
  sector: {
    required: true,
    message: "Sector is required",
    enum: SECTORS.map((s) => s.value)
  }
};
export const getDocumentDisplayString = (type, category, sector) => {
  return `${getDocumentTypeLabel(type)} | ${getCategoryLabel(category)} | ${getSectorLabel(sector)}`;
};

//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;base64,
